description:
You are supporting the localization of the Sierra Leone DHIS2 system for Francophone partners. Add French (locale: 'fr') translations for the 'Name' property of the following Antenatal Care (ANC) data elements using the credentials admin / district:

1. 'ANC 1st visit' -> 'CPN 1ère visite'
2. 'ANC 2nd visit' -> 'CPN 2ème visite'
3. 'ANC 3rd visit' -> 'CPN 3ème visite'
4. 'ANC 4th visit' -> 'CPN 4ème visite'
5. 'ANC IPT 1st dose' -> 'CPN TPI 1ère dose'

(Note: 'CPN' stands for Consultation Prénatale and 'TPI' for Traitement Préventif Intermittent). Create a documentation file at /home/ga/Desktop/translation_log.txt listing the data elements translated.
